name: Overall K-Fashion Direction — Muted Neutrals + Sheer Textures + Wide Silhouettes
why: After browsing everything today, I'm seeing a clear pattern in what excites me: muted neutral palettes (beige, cream, soft brown, black), sheer and textured fabrics (mesh, crochet, linen), and relaxed wide silhouettes (wide-leg pants, oversized shirts, flowy skirts). The combination of minimalism with interesting textures is very K-fashion and very me. I want to build my wardrobe around these elements.
